data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. OKLAHOMA placed on debut by 3.5 lengths (22.79) at this track over 380m. Looks suited here and big improvement expected. 1. MISS EMMA MAY was below best at her last couple, the latest finishing fourth at this track, but was among the placings at this track three back. Well placed here and should do much better. 8. OPTIONAL is on debut without trialling for this. Likely to run well. 2. ELECTRA SHADOW missed the placings here last start but is well-placed to make amends.","runners":[7,1,8,2],"exclusive":false}
